hooks.command: output=$(cargo dclippy 2>&1); rc=$?; if [ $rc -ne 0 ]; then echo "$output" >&2; exit 2; fi

cmd=$(cat | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('tool_input',{}).get('command',''))" 2>/dev/null); case "$cmd" in 'git commit'*) output=$(cargo fmt --check 2>&1 && cargo dclippy 2>&1); rc=$?; if [ $rc -ne 0 ]; then echo "Pre-commit checks failed:" >&2; echo "$output" >&2; exit 2; fi;; esac; exit 0
